interface.longDescription: Nesha helps founders, GTM teams, and corporate development leaders find high-fit strategic partners using its Synergy Engine. Get ranked recommendations for co-sell, channel alliances, technology alliances, go-to-market collaborations, and licensing/white-label/OEM with clear “why this fits” insights and practical ways to collaborate. Click Request Intro to start a warm, double-opt-in introduction.
defaultPrompt: Find partners that could resell our product as part of their offering
